title: E2 — fabric-import proposed_reason inference upgrade (6-reason coverage matrix)
description: Replace hardcoded `proposed_reason: 'new-dependency-or-pattern'` at L179 with a per-commit inferred value. Add Step 2.1.5 chapter with a 6-reason inference matrix mapping (commit-prefix + body-cue) → reason. Worked Example A reclassified as `diagnostic-then-fix`. Fallback retains `new-dependency-or-pattern`. Three-mirror sync.

files.target: Step 2.1 (currently hardcoded reason) + new Step 2.1.5 + Worked Example A
files.change: Delete `proposed_reason: 'new-dependency-or-pattern'` literal at L179; replace with `<inferred per Step 2.1.5>`. Add Step 2.1.5 chapter: inference matrix table — feat:/feat(...): → new-dependency-or-pattern, fix:/fix(...): → diagnostic-then-fix, refactor:/refactor(...): → refactor-pattern-discovery, test:/test(...): → testing-gap-closed, docs:/docs(...): → documentation-decision, chore:/chore(...): → maintenance-process-shift. Body-cue overrides: 'closes #' or 'fixes #' → diagnostic-then-fix regardless of prefix. Reclassify Worked Example A to use diagnostic-then-fix

implementation: Read fabric-import SKILL.md around L179 to find the hardcoded reason literal; confirm exact line + context

Draft Step 2.1.5 'Inferring proposed_reason from Commit Prefix + Body' chapter with a 6-row table:
  - feat / feat(...): → new-dependency-or-pattern
  - fix / fix(...): → diagnostic-then-fix
  - refactor / refactor(...): → refactor-pattern-discovery
  - test / test(...): → testing-gap-closed
  - docs / docs(...): → documentation-decision
  - chore / chore(...): → maintenance-process-shift
Add body-cue override: if commit body contains 'closes #N' or 'fixes #N' or 'resolves #N' → force diagnostic-then-fix regardless of prefix
Add fallback rule: when prefix unrecognized and no body cue → use new-dependency-or-pattern (preserves prior behavior)
Update Step 2.1 — replace literal proposed_reason with `<inferred per Step 2.1.5 — pass commit prefix + body cue>` placeholder
Find Worked Example A; reclassify the reason in its fab_extract_knowledge call from new-dependency-or-pattern → diagnostic-then-fix (since example commit is a fix)

reference.examples: Existing fabric-archive Phase 2 uses proposed_reason with explicit values; this task generalizes the mapping for import's git-mining pipeline

criteria: fabric-import SKILL.md L179 area no longer contains literal `proposed_reason: 'new-dependency-or-pattern'`; replaced with inference reference
Step 2.1.5 chapter present with 6-row matrix table
Worked Example A reclassified to diagnostic-then-fix
All 6 reason strings present verbatim in template (greppable)

rationale.chosen_approach: 6-row matrix + body-cue override + fallback; LLM infers from commit metadata at import time
alternatives_considered: Skill calls a server-side inference helper (adds round-trip)
Keep hardcoded reason and document override in user docs
decision_factors: LLM can infer from commit prefix without server help
Body-cue override catches common fix-as-feature commits
rationale.tradeoffs: LLM may misclassify unconventional commit messages; fallback ensures forward progress

manual_checks: Open import SKILL.md and find Step 2.1.5 chapter
Verify matrix has 6 rows + body-cue override + fallback
Find Worked Example A and verify reason='diagnostic-then-fix'
